# How decisive were these results, combined?

Seven questions, and only one of them actually about basketball.


::: {.cell}

:::


**TL;DR:** Subway beat Pickup Truck so badly (41–12, 77%) that it barely edged out Smoked Brisket's equally dominant win over Hot Pastrami for "least controversial opinion of the week." The Knicks-vs-Spurs matchup that actually gave this poll its name wasn't even the closest race — that honor goes to Breakfast, which landed 28–27, about as close to a coin flip as it gets.


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}

|:-----------|--:|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|:------------|--------------:|:---------------|----------:|:-------------|-------------:|

# Does HQ agree with RTP?


::: {.cell}

:::



::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}


|question    |Leader (overall)   |HQ share    |RTP share   |Gap (pts) | p-value|
|:-----------|:------------------|:-----------|:-----------|:---------|-------:|
|Breakfast   |Bagel Sandwich     |44% (14/32) |61% (14/23) |17%       |   0.327|
|Catchphrase |"I'm walkin' here" |48% (15/31) |56% (15/27) |7%        |   0.778|
|Grocery     |Bodega             |63% (17/27) |62% (13/21) |1%        |   1.000|
|Meats       |Smoked Brisket     |85% (22/26) |71% (15/21) |13%       |   0.459|
|Seasons     |Four Seasons       |69% (22/32) |70% (16/23) |1%        |   1.000|
|Team        |Knicks             |74% (23/31) |59% (13/22) |15%       |   0.389|
|Transport   |Subway             |83% (25/30) |70% (16/23) |14%       |   0.392|


:::
:::



::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![HQ vs RTP support for each question's overall winner.](index_files/figure-html/fig-hq-rtp-1.png){#fig-hq-rtp width=672}
:::
:::


The Alignment Index keeps climbing back toward Earth Day levels — **0.74** this week (cumulative: **0.84**) — which makes it a little surprising that Breakfast produced this week's widest office gap, 17%. The topline number recovering doesn't mean individual questions stop splitting; look closely and this one's a repeat of Earth Day's Volunteering trick: the combined total for Breakfast looked almost exactly tied (28–27), but that's because the offices actually disagree: HQ's real preference was Breakfast Taco, while RTP's was Bagel Sandwich.

It happened twice this week, actually — Catchphrase told the same story (HQ leaned "Bless your heart", RTP leaned "I'm walkin' here", and the combined total again looked like a near-tie). That brings the running count to **4 questions** since RTP joined where the topline "winner" only held up because two offices leaning in opposite directions happened to cancel each other out.
